creator: ddegroot@talon.nl
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #14)
Thanks for the detailed information and your help fixing the issue(s). The chan-sccp module does depend on iconv to run correctly. It might be wise to add the gettext-tools dependency (To prevent future issues). So if you wouldn't mind adding it, that would be great. I thought setting the ICONV dependency would take care of it (apparently not).
